"abstract":"【轻系统+搞钱+日常+慢热+多女主】
三流大学毕业的李昊，在没有合适工作的情况下选择去送外卖。
在一次送外卖的途中为了救一个小孩，被车撞了以后觉醒了千倍返利系统。
本来一单外卖只能赚几块钱的他，现在每送一单都能几千几千的赚。
突然人生就好起来了。
有了钱以后，很多烦恼都不叫烦恼，不能解决的原因只能是钱不够多。
面对社会的种种不公平的现象，李昊也敢于出手。
然后李昊就有了房子，有了车子。
面对喜欢的女生，李昊也大胆的去追求。
本来李昊以为自己的一生就会这样过去。
不过能力越大，责任就越大，在有了系统的那一刻，李昊的人生就进入了另一条轨道。
……
当我不再为了赚钱，一切问题都不再是问题。
李昊的公司开起来了，他不从消费者赚钱，他不赚员工的钱。
小黄人，小蓝人：李昊，别卷我们了，我们给员工加福利，给商家让利，让我们活吧！
国外车企：坚决地抵制李昊的产品进入我国，不能让他再赚我们的钱了，我们的车都卖不进华夏了。
消费者：总算有个公司把我们当人看了。
供应商：最喜欢和李总做生意了，结账很爽快。
员工：什么打工仔？我们是给自己干活！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6f6a7b6f0cb469a9a8a6be545754d552~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"杜千金不月半","author_id":"","book_id":"7369487551565925438","book_name":"都是送外卖，我有千倍返利系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369491672033411646","read_count":"518","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"683873"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"338","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,外卖,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6f6a7b6f0cb469a9a8a6be545754d552~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389840&x-signature=gIlwUPZ6%2BfZ6GDXZv6LIh7YTvbI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111186571871","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"123"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025719E7EAEB8BB4B8A082B0A8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30702,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1992},"user_action":{"author":0
